mapper.insert: insert into appoint(book_no, book_name, user_id, user_name, user_phone, number) values(#{bookNo}, #{bookName}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{userPhone}, #{number})
mapper.update: update appoint set book_no = #{bookNo}, book_name = #{bookName}, user_id = #{userId}, user_phone = #{userPhone}, number = #{number}, updatetime = #{updatetime} where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select * from appoint
book_name like concat('%', #{ bookName },'%')
and book_no like concat('%', #{ bookNo },'%')
and user_name like concat('%', #{ userName },'%')
order by id desc
